sevenDay.synopsis: What a difference a day makes! Skies are VFR across the LFA, and there are NEG hazards to be found. The weather will remain nice thru the training week, then cigs could set up for the AM periods this weekend. No rain in sight.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 17 MAR - 23 MAR
